attributes.magic: PE32 executable (GUI) Intel 80386, for MS Windows

sigma_analysis_results.rule_title: Disable Windows Defender AV Security Monitoring
sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Detects attackers attempting to disable Windows Defender using Powershell

Detects the usage of one of the the commands to stop services such as 'net', 'sc'...etc in order to stop critical or important windows services such as AV, Backup...etc. As seen being used in some ransomware scripts
